feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Be me >White, average, just living my life >Watch trailer for GTA VI >See peopl…
entry.content: >Be me >White, average, just living my life >Watch trailer for GTA VI >See people absolutely losing their minds over it >"Wait, is this not actually illegal?" Like, you are literally playing a simulator of being a high level criminal. You are robbing banks, killing people in the street, and causing absolute chaos. How are we just collectively deciding this is "entertainment"? Maybe it's the modern brain rot. People need constant dopamine hits of digital violence to feel alive. It’s basically jus

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >”And then he goes “carbon fibre works great under pressure” and I go “carbon fi…
entry.content: >”And then he goes “carbon fibre works great under pressure” and I go “carbon fibre? This isn’t a fucking race car you retard. My deep sea challenger uses 64mm thick STEEL, it can withstand 16,000 psi, I seasoned the hull myself. You and your shitty Xbox controller are going to be shrimp paste on the ocean floor”. Anyhow so Avatar 6 just started pre-production.”

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Unironically I wish all Bungie Purists fucking hung or shot themselves. I genuin…
entry.content: Unironically I wish all Bungie Purists fucking hung or shot themselves. I genuinely hope you die and kill yourself tonight. I wish you were literally, actually dead. Like on the floor in your own blood or hanging from the ceiling with no pulse. I'm so fucking sick of you whiny, pedantic, moronic, OCD-ridden, nostalgia-blinded FAGGOTS, who are obsessed with every change in Halo, big or small. I hate you with every fibre of my being. I wish that a meteor would hit your house and specifically your

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: IT'S OUT.
entry.content: The demo is out, what do you think of this iteration of Jonathan Blow's genius? Here are my first impressions from playing for an hour: > the graphics are great but HOW THE FUCK DOES IT LAG SO FUCKING MUCH? DOOM 2016 RAN ON ULTRA PERFECT SETTINGS WITH 0 LAG. HOW THE FUCK DO THESE ASSHOLES MANAGE TO MAKE SOME ISOMETRIC BULLSHIT WITH 0 ACTION THIS FUCKING UNOPTIMIZED? > a lot of the thoughts characters have are incomprehensible and it required to much energy to try to figure out wtf is that suppos

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Imo
entry.content: The original switch and switch OLED were the perfect size for a handheld device. Any bigger an they are uncomfortable to hold and a nightmare to bring anywhere. The steam deck and switch 2 have good screens but the trade off in size isn't worth it.

entry.content: >get a company car for a cross country audit thing >its a newish vw >radar cruise control, all sorts of assists, electronic handbrake, fancy steering wheel with shitloads of buttons >"wow this shit is great, fancy af" >park a bit too close to my garage >hop in to roll it forward a little bit, start it cus I know it will be mad if I just clutch in and handbrake off and let it roll a bit >e-brake doesnt automatically release as I drive forward, release it >starts beeping and freaking out for somet

entry.title: /int/ International: BREAKING: The celebration in Stenegård, Järvsö, started as usual on Midsummer Ev…
entry.content: BREAKING: The celebration in Stenegård, Järvsö, started as usual on Midsummer Eve. But this year it wasn't quite as usual. Here's a clip showing how the large Midsummer pole falls straight towards visitors just as it is being erected. Hundreds of people witnessed the incident when the magnificent pole was dropped and broken while it was being erected during the morning. No one was injured in the incident, but once the dance got underway, it had to be without a midsummer pole. https://www.svt.se/

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Canada still has a STEM worker shortage, according to CBC
entry.content: https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/toro nto/ontario-universities-report-lab our-force-grads-9.7240932 >More than one million university graduates will be needed to fill labour market needs over the next decade, with the highest demand coming from science, technology, engineering and mathematics (STEM) fields, a report from the Council of Ontario Universities projects. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h0m 8p15uPms

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Designing the best ImageBoard/BBS/Forum
entry.content: Suppose you would start from scratch making the "best" {Image,Text}Board/BBS/Forum, how would it be like? Or what are the things you wish the current options could do better, or a feature you'd like added or removed? How would you ensure the community is good and not retarded? Generally let discuss what makes a good social software and community, and what makes it bad, and how you can manage and moderate it. Some good links: >http://shirky.com/essays/a-group-i s-its-own-worst-enemy/ >http://shir

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Has anyone been able to successfully patch FFmpeg with FCVVDP? The patch was rel…
entry.content: Has anyone been able to successfully patch FFmpeg with FCVVDP? The patch was released in March 2026 and so was ffmpeg 8.0 so it should work. What the FUCK am I doing wrong mannnnn... user01@DESKTOP-10GG5AB:/mnt/c/FCVVD P$ git clone --branch n8.0 --depth 1 https://git.ffmpeg.org/ffmpeg.git ffmpeg Cloning into 'ffmpeg'... user01@DESKTOP-10GG5AB:/mnt/c/FCVVD P$ cd ffmpeg user01@DESKTOP-10GG5AB:/mnt/c/FCVVD P/ffmpeg$ cat RELEASE_NOTES The FFmpeg Project proudly presents FFmpeg 8.0 "Huffman", about 1

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /pmdt/ - Pokemon Mystery Dungeon Trash General #110
entry.content: Thieves Den! Edition Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83340991 Welcome to /pmdt/! A thread for posting art, writing, and discussing of the Pokémon Mystery Dungeon Series! Especially if it's saucy~ You can post art, recommend comics or fanfics, talk about the games/setting, or just roll to see what Pokémon you wake up as! If you'd like to join in the RP, the Lore Archive gives a general summary of the setting and history so far! We have a shared setting for the thread if you

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Pixel love thread
entry.content: Google has massively improved its software over the last five years. Back then, iOS mogged Android so hard it barely felt like a competition. Apple's software looked cleaner, felt smoother, and had a more premium vibe overall. Android had features, but it often came across as less polished and more inconsistent. Now, Android feels completely different. The UI looks premium, animations are smooth, performance is solid, and the whole experience feels refined. Google's design language has matured a

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8387 Doe pussy Edition Previous Thread: >>83534063 F-lis…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8387 Doe pussy Edition Previous Thread: >>83534063 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles

entry.title: /b/ Random: i feel like this is definitely not normal, but i'll just ask...is it normal to s…
entry.content: i feel like this is definitely not normal, but i'll just ask...is it normal to still talk to yourself about shit that happened many years ago, and pretending like you're in a room with some people you used to hang out with? i do this all the time and i feel like this is very strange behavior.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Why are people still saying "indie just means not signed to a major label", thus…
entry.content: Why are people still saying "indie just means not signed to a major label", thus denying that it has become a genre with a specific sound, aesthetic, unwritten rules, production technique, fashion style, and live show culture? We should just admit that indie has become a genre and come up with a new word for self-published music.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: New old school rap
entry.content: Im looking for some old rap I found on youtube around 2010 I think. It was a slow rap, sounds a little bit old school. The thumbnail was a grainy photo of family car on a road. Probably chrysler voyager. Similar to pic related but photo was from a bit far. I think the rapper name was Earl. I found Earl Sweatshirt and he fits what Im looking for but I can't find that song and that car cover photo. any ideas? If not just post similar new but old school rap songs/artists

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why are zoomers and millennials ok with the state of technology?
entry.content: >come home early to watch an 80s disney movie with the kids on a friday evening >oops Disney+ is down >oops Amazon AWS is also down and so is every other streaming service >can't watch any movies >day ruined Before you say this wouldn't happen to you because you pirate, then sure, but the average person is not competent enough and has to rely on what society is currently giving to them in the form of streaming. How do millennials have the gull to get rid of Cable TV and TVs on their own entirely

entry.title: /g/ Technology: God, I just fucked up real bad!
entry.content: I bought two old consoles - ps1 and ps2 (both are slim versions) for about 80$ each. I tried to run my pirated discs on them and they refuse to read them because they're not chipmodded (they read licenced games and dvd movies/audio cds just fine) and I burned about 50 discs and wasted so much time. Original games are ridiculously overpriced, even heavily used ones. Nobody seems to make these chips anymore. Fuck, what I'm supposed to do with this piece of useless plastic junk. I guess there's no

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: What kind of things do you daydream about
entry.content: For past couple days i keep daydreaming that ill play my fave guitar songs in front of friends and family and that they would all clap after and say how cool i was for doing that. Then ill be known not only for how cool i already am, but also for knowing how to guitar and sing really cooly too. This scenario im daydreaming is pretty low stakes, not much to gain from it. Even if i fulfilled this it wouldnt really amount to anything or change my life at all, yet i still daydream it for some reason

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Can’t get it up as easily as you used to? You’re not alone. Millions of men are …
entry.content: Can’t get it up as easily as you used to? You’re not alone. Millions of men are struggling with weak, soft, unreliable hard-ons… But according to a pastor who uncovered a mistranslation in ancient Scripture, it has NOTHING to do with age or blood flow. It’s because your “Erection Center” has shut down. This tiny God-designed system controls your erection’s strength, fullness, and staying power. And when it breaks down, nothing you try works — not pills, pumps, or procedures. But here’s the shock

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Europe taking over American tech
entry.content: >To reduce European dependence on American technology firms, the European Parliament has replaced Google with a French search engine, Qwant. >Qwant generates its search results by querying the Microsoft Bing API.

entry.content: further details will come in July
